policy.purpose: Decide whether remaining unpromoted families can move from inventory/config coverage to source-backed normalized engineering rows.

REDUCER.reason: Possible reducer-like data is classified under fitting/swage or BW fitting sources; a reducer-specific schema and mapping rule must be approved before any reducer row is promoted.

OLET.reason: Olet source folders exist in raw inventory, but no normalized olet catalog/schema has been approved yet.

GASKET.reason: Current gasket rows are selector/inventory rows only. Numeric gasket dimensions must remain null/UNAVAILABLE until parseable dimension source tables are verified.

SUPPORT.reason: Support rows currently represent project/default rules and selector availability. Committed Span/Gpas inventory contains config/sketch sources, not approved numeric support/span source tables.
